query:
SELECT id, userId, 
  LENGTH(tastytradeRefreshToken) as refresh_token_length,
  SUBSTR(tastytradeRefreshToken, 1, 50) as refresh_token_start,
  SUBSTR(tastytradeRefreshToken, -50) as refresh_token_end
FROM apiCredentials WHERE userId = 1;
command:

  LENGTH(tastytradeRefreshToken) as refresh_token_length,
  SUBSTR(tastytradeRefreshToken, 1, 50) as refresh_token_start,
  SUBSTR(tastytradeRefreshToken, -50) as refresh_token_end
FROM apiCredentials WHERE userId = 1;
